market_overview: Idle RPG market is saturated but growing. Key differentiators are story depth, visual quality, and fair monetization. Players are tired of predatory gacha and forced check-ins.

competitors.name: Idle Heroes
competitors.our_advantage: Fairer monetization, better story, no forced 2-3h check-ins, modern web-first approach

competitors.name: AFK Arena
competitors.our_advantage: Tactical formation system, web accessibility, admin-driven live events, cosmetic-only gacha (fair system)

competitors.name: King's Bounty: Legions
competitors.our_advantage: Modern idle mechanics, auto-battle, offline progress, better UX, active development

competitors.name: Heroes of Might and Magic (various mobile)
competitors.our_advantage: Lightweight web app, true idle gameplay, instant updates, no app store gatekeeping

competitors.name: Idle Bounty Adventures (original)
competitors.our_advantage: Active development, modern stack, new graphics, expanded content, full ownership, PWA

market_gaps: Story-driven idle RPG with actual narrative depth
Web-first with true mobile PWA experience
Admin tools for live ops (events, balance tuning)
target_positioning: The fair idle RPG - deep mechanics without predatory monetization, cosmetic-only purchases, accessible everywhere

differentiation_strategy.short_term: Superior UX, fair economy, active development
differentiation_strategy.medium_term: Rich story content, live events, community features
